description: Evan Batsell from Jito Labs discusses node consensus networks (NCNs) and Jito restaking, emphasizing the integration of decentralized networks with Solana's consensus layer. He outlines the benefits of building NCNs, including increased trust, cost efficiency, and regulatory compliance. A simple example of a weather oracle for Solana Beach is presented, illustrating the practical application of NCNs in decentralized protocols.
topic_summary: Evan Batsell explains the concept of node consensus networks and Jito restaking, highlighting their significance in enhancing decentralization and efficiency within the Solana ecosystem. He provides a practical example of a weather oracle, demonstrating how NCNs can be implemented.
